content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty +0.36% with VIX elevated at 18.55. Breadth is mixed — Realty/Pharma/Metal leading, IT and PSU Bank lagging. Late-session (14:10), only 1h 19m to close. Many of my held names already had a strong morning move and have given back gains intraday — typical post-event distribution. Priority is risk management on the existing 10-position book; no new entries warranted this late in session.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24000,
      "nifty_resistance": 24300
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1033.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +6.1%. Strong Q4 (PAT +19% YoY, GNPA <1%, NIM expansion). Trail SL from 1030 → 1033 (just under intraday Support 1 of 1033.30, ~1% below CMP 1044). Locks in ~5% gain while leaving room for normal noise. Target retained at 1110 (52w high zone)."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF, -2.3% unrealized but well above SL 119 (price 122.15). MACD bearish near-term but structural gold thesis intact (CB buying, geopolitical premia). VIX 18.55 supports holding the hedge. SL 119 is ~2.6% below CMP — appropriate for a low-vol ETF; no MODIFY needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "new_target": 25.20,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.6%. Current SL 23.70 is slightly BELOW entry 23.65 (cost-basis breakeven). Trail to 23.85 — just above cost, ~0.6% below CMP 24.00 — locks breakeven+ on this defensive sector ETF while pharma sector showing relative strength."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1718.00,
      "new_target": 1790.00,
      "confidence": 0.78,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.6%. Stock broke 52w high at 1748 today on Q4 print (revenue +25%, EBITDA +20%) and Jefferies upgrade. CMP 1728.50. Trail SL from 1715 → 1718 (just above entry 1700, ~0.6% below CMP). Target 1790 retained. Group already up 25% in a month — manage exhaustion risk by tightening."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.9%. Today opened at 1590 (52w high zone) and faded -4% to 1530 on 4.2x volume — distribution after parabolic move. SL 1510 is 1.4% below CMP, appropriately tight. Board meeting May 14 (binary event) — within the 3-session window only if it falls inside that. Currently 7 trading sessions away, so no rule breach yet. Hold to SL or evaluate exit closer to event."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.9%. Gap-up high 13976 faded to 13500. Q4 PAT -6.9% (margin pressure) is the drag despite record sales. SL 13400 is ~0.7% below CMP — tight; let the SL do its job. No MODIFY needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.60,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -1.4%. Q4 print was strong (PAT +68% YoY, NIM 6.2%, multiple broker upgrades). Stock surged to 212.66 then faded to 205.95 on profit-taking after 8.2x volume spike. SL 204 is ~1% below CMP — tight and appropriate. Thesis intact, hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -0.3% essentially flat. Stock spiked to 4590 on BHEL read-through then faded to 4549. Defence theme intact, F414 deal catalyst pending. SL 4480 is ~1.6% below CMP — appropriate. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 504.00,
      "new_target": 540.00,
      "confidence": 0.62,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.7%. Realty sector leader (+2.14%). Trail SL from 502 → 504 (just below entry 506, ~0.9% below CMP 508.50). Note: Q4 board meeting May 11 is binary event in 5 sessions — outside the 3-session rule window, but flagging for next-week reassessment. If position doesn't make material progress by May 8, will exit ahead of event."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.50,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position -2.6%. CRITICAL: Board meeting TODAY (May 4) for FY26 results, earnings call May 6 — this is a 3-session-window binary event per Rule 11. Position is ~5.4% of capital (~₹47k of ₹1M). CMP 359.40 is approaching SL 365 — actually CMP is BELOW current stored SL 365, meaning the SL should have triggered. Stored SL 365 > CMP 359.40 — position is at/past stop. Recommend EXIT — reclassifying."
    },
    {
      "action": "EXIT",
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "quantity": 130,
      "order_type": "MARKET",
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "OVERRIDING prior HOLD: stored SL is 365, CMP is 359.40 — SL has been violated (CMP < SL). Additionally, BINARY EVENT TODAY (board meeting for FY26 results + Wed earnings call). Per Rule 11, default disposition into 3-session binary catalyst is exit/trim. Position is -2.6% (~₹1,294 loss) — close at MARKET to avoid earnings-tail risk and respect the SL that's already been breached. Frees capital and removes overnight binary exposure."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1033.00,
      "reasoning": "Lock in ~5% gain on strong Q4 winner; SL just under intraday support."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge; SL appropriate for low-vol ETF."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 23.85,
      "reasoning": "Trail above cost basis; pharma sector relative strength."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ADANIPORTS",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1718.00,
      "reasoning": "52w high breakout on Q4; tighten SL above entry to lock gain into exhaustion risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Distribution after 52w high spike; SL 1510 tight at 1.4%, let it work."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "MARUTI",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Margin disappointment in Q4; SL 13400 close enough — trust the stop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Strong Q4 thesis intact; profit-taking normal post 8.2x volume spike."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HAL",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defence theme intact; SL appropriately placed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ANANTRAJ",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 504.00,
      "reasoning": "Realty sector strength; minor trail; flag May 11 board meeting for next-week review."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "EXIDEIND",
      "current_action": "EXIT",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 365 already breached (CMP 359.40 < SL 365); binary event today (board meeting) and May 6 earnings call. Exit at market to control tail risk and respect stop."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHEL, HAL, BAJAJ-AUTO, ADANIPOWER all show stretched RSI/extension. Will reassess after the late-session settle. BANDHANBNK and PNBHOUSING continue as primary held theses. CESC/RRKABEL on watch but late-session entry not warranted with VIX 18.55.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is well-diversified (10 names across Financials, ETFs, Services, Auto, Realty, Capital Goods, Banking, Auto-Components). Deployed 52% — comfortable cushion. Today's actions: 4 SL trails locking profits/breakeven, 1 EXIT on EXIDEIND (binary event + SL breached). No new entries late in session with VIX elevated. Day P&L +0.67%, cumulative +0.43% — modest but positive. Avoiding the prior cluster-stacking and round-trip failure modes by NOT chasing late-day breakouts in already-crowded power/defence/realty themes."
}
